hypothesis: Increase L2 regularization (lambda_l2=1.0 vs current 0.1) with Tweedie 1.2, num_leaves=256, learning_rate=0.03. Previous runs with Tweedie 1.2 scored ~0.94513. Stronger regularization may reduce overfitting on the rich feature set and improve generalization. Also adding lambda_l1=0.05 for slight sparsity. All other settings match best configuration.
